column1: All DLC packs in Year Passes are available for purchase separately.
column4: Keep in mind that you can preview any truck on the list from within the game. Scroll to the end in the Truck Store to find all vehicles from DLCs you do not own.
column7: *On Hard Mode (or New Game+ with the appropriate rule enabled) all trucks with "Added to Storage" marking have to be purchased in the Truck Store instead.
